title: artifact-verification
description: Machine-written proof that the verification step ran for a stage. Presence gate input: proves the step ran, not who ran it — actor is attribution, never authorization. Written to plans/<active-plan>/artifacts/verification.json.

stage.description: Stage this verification covers (push|pr|merge|ship|deploy); descriptive only, not enum-validated

plan.description: Plan dir name this verification belongs to

phase.description: Optional: the plan-graph node id (e.g. P3) this verification covers. Additive/optional (back-compat: an old verification omitting it still passes the gate). Enables the per-phase evidence snapshot (verification-<phase>.json) that derive_plan_completion counts for safe auto-close; a verification missing phase is simply not snapshotted (under-count, never over-close).

name.description: check name; for a DoD test type this is the test_type id (unit|integration|regression|coverage|security|...)

format.description: result format the DoD gate re-reads this check's raw file with; optional (only on test-type checks). A check carrying `format` is DoD-bearing: its `name` MUST equal a canonical test_type id (harness/data/test-policy.yaml) or the DoD gate reads it as a MISSING type. `manual` carries telemetry-anchored evidence instead of a result file (see evidence_tier/anchor_id/charter_cosign)

file.description: result file path relative to the plan's artifacts/ dir; the DoD gate re-derives pass/fail from THIS raw file, not from status. Must resolve under artifacts/ (no symlink escape)

evidence_tier.description: manual check only: `anchored` cites a Bash trace the manual-test hook witnessed (a floor, not authentication); `claimed` is agent-written and below the floor

anchor_id.description: manual check only: the cited anchor id (sha256/16) the DoD gate cross-checks against the manual-test anchor telemetry; a fabricated id is rejected. `trace_id` is accepted as an alias

trace_id.description: manual check only: alias for anchor_id

charter_cosign.description: manual check only: the rostered reviewer (distinct from actor) who co-signed the charter; required for a HARD manual requirement — anchored output without a co-sign stays soft

checks.description: Named checks; any FAIL blocks hard stages. A check carrying format+file feeds the DoD-by-change-class gate, which re-reads the raw file (self-report does not self-approve)

verdict.description: Overall verdict of the verification run

change_class.description: Optional: the derived change-class (feature|bugfix|refactor|dep_bump_major|release) this run targeted; informational/telemetry — the gate re-derives from the git diff, it does not trust this field

signals.description: Optional: the fact-signals behind the derived change_class (src_changed, test_has_assertions, ...). Telemetry only; not a gate input

grace.description: Optional: a recorded policy grace honored for this run (carries reason + expires); written for audit visibility, never to lower the gate by itself

expires.description: ISO date; past it the gate stops honoring the grace and re-blocks hard

ticket_id.description: Seam for the task-store issue/MR link; optional
